goal: Remove all shell scripts and ensure the Go version of aether works perfectly, we are finalising the system, also ensure to remove all parts of the GSD system from this repo, this has to be done with extreme care and safety

learnings.phase_name: Enforce non-skippable playbook execution in build orchestrators

learnings.claim: Adding pre-synthesis verification gates to build orchestrators catches incomplete builds before synthesis — gate should name all prerequisite stages explicitly
learnings.evidence: All 6 success criteria passed on first build attempt, watcher quality 9/10

learnings.claim: Running lint:sync and lint as a dedicated verification phase after code changes confirms no sync drift — useful as a final gate before colony seal
learnings.evidence: lint:sync confirmed 45+45 commands and 24 agents in sync, lint (shellcheck+json+sync) all clean, 524 tests pass

learnings.claim: Parallel swarm audits (4 scouts) are effective for commit review — each scout can deeply examine a specific area while cross-referencing findings
learnings.evidence: 4 scouts produced structured verdicts for Stage Audit Gate, Exchange Tests, State API, and Cross-Reference consistency

learnings.claim: Untracked test files can encode wrong assumptions — test-colony-data-dir.sh expected COLONY_DATA_DIR for COLONY_STATE.json but the architecture requires DATA_DIR
learnings.evidence: Scout 3 traced _resolve_colony_data_dir bootstrap chain and confirmed COLONY_STATE.json must stay at DATA_DIR root

learnings.claim: Standalone instinct storage with full schema (trust_score, trust_tier, provenance, application_history, related_instincts) is cleaner than embedding instincts in COLONY_STATE.json — enables independent queries and decay without touching colony state
learnings.evidence: instinct-store.sh with 16 tests passing, instinct-read-trusted/decay-all/archive all functional, 50-instinct cap with automatic archival

learnings.claim: jq-based graph layer provides adequate relationship traversal for instinct networks up to a few hundred edges — BFS reach with max-hops=3 cap prevents pathological queries
learnings.evidence: graph.sh with graph-link/neighbors/reach/cluster all functional, union-find clustering works for current scale

learnings.claim: Backward-compatible migration for existing observations (legacy trust_score backfill at 0.49) lets new fields coexist with old data without breaking reads
learnings.evidence: learning-observe now computes trust_score on write, legacy migration fills 62 existing entries with 0.49 default, all 524 tests pass
